Bus Timings

Abu Dhabi Bus 911 Timings Bateen West Souq to Hili Fun City

March 5, 2026
By Al Khaleej
Install
★★★★★ 5.0
Google Play Official App
UAE Bus Timing

Travel across the UAE with confidence. No confusion. No wasted time.

Public transport system in Abu Dhabi is a model of efficiency to serve residents as well as visitors. One such route, that is bus 911, is among the most important routes that allow passengers to transit from Bateen West Souq to Hili Fun City and stops in between at important Al Ain’s points. Operational details, major stops, and a travel guide to help you on your journey, 911 route overview has it all.

Contents

Operational Details

Bus 911 assures timely departures throughout the day; it is dependable on its schedule. Below is the detailed timetable:

911 Weekday Morning Schedule

911 Weekday Evening Schedule

911 Weekend Morning Schedule

911 Weekend Evening ScheduleClick this link for 911 Bus Timings, for detailed schedules, please refer to the official AD Mobility website.

Ticket Pricing: Fares begin from AED 2 standard fare through the Hafilat Card, which can be recharged online or at designated kiosks.

Route Overview

Bus 911 offers many important landmarks and places to go to in Al Ain, so it is useful for people living in, or visiting, the city. Below is an overview of the major stops along this route:

  1. Bateen West Souq: Starting point for the journey.

  2. Salem Saud Al Wahaibi Mosque: A serene neighborhood landmark.

  3. North Souq: A bustling market area.

  4. Al Maqam Health Center: A stop for medical services.

  5. Radwan Mosque: A peaceful place of worship.

  6. Garden: A pleasant area for relaxation.

  7. Maqam Palace East: Close to a significant landmark.

8.

  1. Tawam Hospital: A critical healthcare facility with two stops nearby.

  2. Khalifa Bin Zayed Street: A key urban hub.

  3. UAE University Maqam 2 & 4 Hostels: Convenient for students.

  4. UAE Science and Innovation Park: A center of learning and research.

  5. Sheikh Mohammed Al Nahyan Field Hospital: An important medical stop.

  6. Al Ruwaikah Residential Complex: A residential community stop.

  7. Saeed Bin Tahnoun the First Street: Another vital connection point.

  8. The Bookshop Library: A spot for book lovers.

  9. Sheikh Hessa Bin Sultan Al Nahyan Mosque: Another peaceful worship site.

  10. Rotana Hotel: A practical stop for travelers.

  11. Al Jahili Park: A scenic spot for leisure and family outings.

  12. Department of Public Health: Close to essential health services.

  13. Shiekha Salama Mosque: Another prominent mosque on the route.

  14. Al Noor Hospital South: A healthcare center.

  15. City Centre: A busy commercial hub.

  16. Mediclinic: Another stop offering medical services.

Recommended Guides

Enhance your daily commute with these essential transport guides:

Complete RTA Intercity Routes Guide Largest Bus Stations Infrastructure in UAE

  1. Dubai Islamic Bank: For financial needs.

  2. Abu Dhabi Tourism Authority: A stop near administrative offices.

  3. Eid Praying Ground: A special location for religious gatherings.

  4. Al Slimi Park: A green space for relaxation.

  5. Al Kharais / Al Ain Gift Markets: A lively shopping destination.

  6. Al Rahma Medical Center / Al Qattara Oasis East: Stops for healthcare and heritage.

  7. Al Qattara Stadium: A venue for sports events.

  8. Al Ain School: Convenient for students and educators.

  9. Al Shaebia Al Hmra Playground: A recreational spot for families.

  10. ADNOC: A strategic stop for various services.

  11. Wahat Hili Mall: Two stops near this shopping destination.

  12. Khabab Ibn Al Hareth Mosque: Another important mosque.

  13. Hili Police Station: A stop near local law enforcement.

  14. Hili Fort: A historic landmark.

  15. Hili Healthcare Center: Providing healthcare services.

  16. Mohammed Bin Khalifa Al Nahyan Street: An important urban connection.

  17. Wedding Hall: A unique venue stop.

  18. Hili Fun City: The final stop, offering family-friendly entertainment at an amusement park.

Other routes in Abu Dhabi you can look into include the 101 bus route which operates between Dalma Mall and Al Reef stations.

Nearby Attractions and Landmarks

Some notable attractions along the Bus 911 route include:

1.

  1. Hili Fort: A historic site near the Hili Police Station.

  2. Wahat Hili Mall: A popular shopping destination near the bus route.

4.

  1. Al Ain National Museum: Located near Al Jahili Fort, this museum provides insights into the region’s rich heritage and history.

6.

7.

  1. Sheikh Zayed Palace Museum (Al Ain Palace Museum): A former residence of Sheikh Zayed, now a museum showcasing traditional Emirati culture and history.

  2. Rotana Hotel Area: Offers proximity to fine dining options and cultural experiences.

  3. Hili Fun City: Adjacent to other attractions, this amusement park is a family favorite.

  4. Al Ain Zoo: Though not directly on the 911 route, it is relatively close and offers a great opportunity to explore wildlife and conservation efforts.

Journey Experience

The journey begins from Bateen West Souq where passengers will enjoy the lively market mood, there they will see key stops including the peaceful Salem Saud Al Wahaibi Mosque and the grand royal Maqam Palace East.

Al Jahili Park, with its lush views neighbouring the historic Al Jahili Fort, is a must see; and it highlights Emirati heritage. The route carries on past UAE University, a hub for innovation, then past Hili Fun City, a family friendly amusement park with attractions nearby such as Hili Archaeological Park, which showcases the city’s ancient history. The long ride is enjoyable and educational because it encapsulates Al Ain’s rich culture along this scenic route.

Official UAE Sources

For the latest schedules, fares, and policy updates, verify with these primary sources:

  • RTA Journey Planner
  • RTA Intercity Timetable Reference (E100)
  • Abu Dhabi Mobility
  • Sharjah Roads and Transport Authority (SRTA)

Editorial review date: March 5, 2026.
